hero.title: Cafe Le Den
hero.subtitle: Homemade with love since 1994
hero.description: Fresh bread, specialty lattes, and homemade meals in the heart of Valois Village, Pointe-Claire.

about.title: Our Story
about.description: For over 30 years, Cafe Le Den has been a beloved gathering place in Valois Village. Run by Gina and Josh, we take pride in our homemade bread, fresh soups, and carefully crafted specialty drinks. Every item is made with love and the finest ingredients.

order.title: Your Order
order.pickupTimeDescription: Choose when you'd like to pick up your order
order.payInPerson: Payment is collected in person at pickup.
order.errorSubmitting: Something went wrong. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Order Placed!
confirmation.thankYou: Thank you! Your order has been sent to the cafe.
confirmation.paymentNote: Please pay in person when you pick up your order.
